description: A designed graphic with a 'Bloomberg Law' logo at the top and a black serif headline on white reading 'Labor Department Expands H-1B Oversight, Tests Enforcement Power'. Below is a photograph of a woman with long dark hair and glasses in a dark blazer speaking at a lectern. A small Department of Labor seal is at the lower left.
notable_text: Bloomberg Law; Labor Department Expands H-1B Oversight, Tests Enforcement Power
